definition.title: Top 10 Truckers Campaign (Referral Marketing Funnel)
definition.objective: Identity acquisition and referral engine. Double-sided rewards outperform single-sided. Turns engaged drivers into recruiters. Cultural seeding phase builds archetype identity content.
definition.target_audience: Older male truck drivers (45-65+) as nominators. Nominated peers as acquisition targets. Broader driver community for cultural seeding.
definition.cadence: Phase 1 Cultural Seeding ACTIVE. 3 of 10 archetypes complete. Blocker: App V2 build for nomination system.

campaign_card.target_audience: Older male truck drivers (45-65+) as nominators. Nominated peers as acquisition targets. Broader driver community for cultural seeding.
key_messages: Identity acquisition funnel — not a content play, a FUNNEL play
Draft Day sports framing gives older drivers permission to nominate peers
Real ones recognize real ones — respect language, not marketing language

initiatives: Archetype videos as mini-campaigns. Nomination card templates. SMS copy variants. Social engagement posts. Funnel integration with upgrade i

_legacy_card.description: NOT a content play — a FUNNEL play. Driver identity acquisition funnel: archetype content to nomination to app signup to referral engine. Uses Draft Day sports framing for older male drivers (45-65+).
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Identity acquisition and referral engine. Double-sided rewards outperform single-sided. Turns engaged drivers into recruiters. Cultural seeding phase builds archetype identity content.
_legacy_card.asset_links:
Pit Stop King Video: Completed
Night Owl Video: Completed
Road Scholar Video: Completed
Top 10 Truckers White Paper: Strategic framework doc
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: Respect language (not social language). Draft Day sports framing. Archetype identity. Peer nomination as status signal.
_legacy_card.artlist_cost: 3 archetype videos complete. 7 more planned — production credits needed.
_legacy_card.repurposing: Archetype videos as mini-campaigns. Nomination card templates. SMS copy variants. Social engagement posts. Funnel integration with upgrade intake form.
_legacy_card.timeline: Phase 1 Cultural Seeding ACTIVE. 3 of 10 archetypes complete. Blocker: App V2 build for nomination system.
